instruction:
Using residues, what is the integral of $\int_{| z |=n} \tan \pi z \, \mathrm{d} z$ (where $n$ is a positive integer)?

Options:
A. $$
- 2 n \mathrm{i}
$$
B. $$
n \mathrm{i}
$$
C. $$
- 8 n \mathrm{i}
$$
D. $$
0
$$
E. $$
- 4 n \mathrm{i}
$$
F. $$
3 n \mathrm{i}
$$
G. $$
4 n \mathrm{i}
$$
H. $$
2 n \mathrm{i}
$$
I. $$
5 n \mathrm{i}
$$
J. $$
- n \mathrm{i}
$$
